101.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to recite in Zuhr and Asr: By the night when it covers, and similar to it, and in Fajr longer than that.
101.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa membaca dalam Zhuhur dan Ashar: wal-layli idzaa yaghsyaa, dan yang semisalnya, dan dalam Subuh lebih panjang dari itu.

102.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ used to recite in Zuhr and Asr: By the sky containing great stars, and By the sky and the night visitor, and similar surahs.
102.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa membaca dalam Zhuhur dan Ashar: was-samaai dzaatil-buruj, dan was-samaai wat-thariq, dan surah-surah yang semisalnya.

103.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: Indeed Allah, the Exalted, has named Madinah Tabah.'
103.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Sesungguhnya Allah Ta'ala telah menamai Madinah dengan Tabah.'

104.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ mentioned twelve khaliphs. Then he said something that was hidden from me. I asked some of the people: 'What did he say?' They said: 'All of them will be from the Quraysh.'
104.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ menyebutkan dua belas khalifah. Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tersembunyi dariku. Aku bertanya kepada sebagian orang: Apa yang beliau katakan? Mereka berkata: Semuanya dari kaum Quraisy.'

105.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ deliver the khutbah except standing.'
105.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ berkhutbah kecuali sambil berdiri.'

106.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We complained to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about the heat of the ground in Zuhr prayer, but he did not respond to our complaint.'
106.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami mengadu kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang panas bumi dalam shalat Zhuhur, tetapi beliau tidak merespons keluhan kami.'

107.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said about a prayer he offered: 'This is a prayer of desire and fear. I asked my Lord, Blessed and Exalted, for three things — He gave me two and withheld one. I asked that He not destroy us as He destroyed the nations before us, and He gave me that.'
107.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda tentang shalat yang beliau kerjakan: 'Ini adalah shalat keinginan dan ketakutan. Aku meminta kepada Rabb-ku tiga hal — Dia memberiku dua dan menahan satu. Aku meminta agar Dia tidak membinasakan kami sebagaimana Dia membinasakan umat sebelum kami, dan Dia mengabulkannya.'

108.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab ibn al-Aratt (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I observed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in a prayer he prayed until near the time of Fajr. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave the salam, Khabbab came and said: O Messenger of Allah, may my father and mother be sacrificed for you — you have prayed such a long prayer tonight.'
108.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab ibn al-Aratt (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mengamati Rasulullah ﷺ dalam shalat yang beliau kerjakan hingga mendekati waktu Subuh. Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ memberi salam, Khabbab datang dan berkata: Ya Rasulullah, semoga ayah dan ibuku menjadi tebusanmu — engkau shalat sangat lama malam ini.'

109.iwh_en: It was narrated that someone asked whether the Prophet ﷺ used to recite in Zuhr. He said: 'Yes.' He asked: 'How did you know?' He said: 'By the movement of his beard.'
109.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seseorang bertanya apakah Nabi ﷺ biasa membaca dalam shalat Zhuhur. Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Ia bertanya: 'Bagaimana kalian tahu?' Ia berkata: 'Dari gerakan jenggot beliau.'

110.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Companions complained to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and asked him to pray to Allah for them and seek His help. His color changed and he said: 'Those before you — a pit would be dug for them and a saw placed on their heads and they would be split in two, yet this would not turn them away from their religion.'
110.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa para Sahabat mengadu kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan memintanya berdoa kepada Allah bagi mereka. Wajah beliau berubah dan beliau bersabda: 'Orang-orang sebelum kalian — lubang digali untuk mereka dan gergaji diletakkan di kepala mereka dan mereka dibelah menjadi dua, namun ini tidak mengalihkan mereka dari agama mereka.'

111.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We emigrated with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ seeking the pleasure of Allah, Blessed and Exalted, so our reward is due from Allah. Among us are those who have passed without having consumed anything of their reward — among them is Mus'ab ibn Umayr who was killed on the Day of Uhud.'
111.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami berhijrah bersama Rasulullah ﷺ mencari keridhaan Allah Tabaaraka wa Ta'ala, sehingga pahala kami wajib atas Allah. Di antara kami ada yang telah wafat tanpa mengambil apapun dari pahalanya — di antara mereka adalah Mush'ab ibn Umayr yang gugur pada Perang Uhud.'

112.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Were it not that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade us from praying for death, I would have prayed for it. He was cauterized seven times in his stomach and said: I have been tried in everything except that which goes in this soil.'
112.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seandainya bukan karena Rasulullah ﷺ melarang kami dari berdoa untuk kematian, niscaya aku akan berdoa untuk itu. Ia dibakar tujuh kali di perutnya dan berkata: Aku telah diuji dalam segala hal kecuali apa yang masuk ke dalam tanah ini.'

113.iwh_en: It was narrated that someone asked: 'Did you know that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was reciting in Zuhr and Asr?' He replied: 'By the movement of his beard.'
113.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seseorang bertanya: 'Apakah kalian tahu bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ membaca dalam Zhuhur dan Ashar?' Ia menjawab: 'Dari gerakan jenggot beliau.'

114.iwh_en: It was narrated that someone asked: 'How did you recognize that the Prophet ﷺ was reciting in Zuhr and Asr?' He replied: 'By the movement of his beard.'
114.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seseorang bertanya: 'Bagaimana kalian mengetahui bahwa Nabi ﷺ membaca dalam Zhuhur dan Ashar?' Ia menjawab: 'Dari gerakan jenggot beliau.'

115.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Companions complained to the Prophet ﷺ about the heat of the ground during prayer, but he did not respond to their complaint.
115.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa para Sahabat mengadu kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang panas bumi saat shalat, tetapi beliau tidak merespons keluhan mereka.

116.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man was advised by the Prophet ﷺ not to kill himself and was told: 'Do not be the servant of Allah who kills.' They asked: 'Did you hear this from your father narrated from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ?' He said: 'Yes.' So they brought him to the riverbank and struck his neck.
116.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang pria dinasihati oleh Nabi ﷺ agar tidak membunuh dirinya sendiri. Mereka bertanya: 'Apakah kamu mendengar ini dari ayahmu yang meriwayatkannya dari Rasulullah ﷺ?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Maka mereka membawanya ke tepi sungai dan memenggal lehernya.

117.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Were it not that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade us from wishing for death, I would have wished for it.'
117.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seandainya bukan karena Rasulullah ﷺ melarang kami dari mengharapkan kematian, niscaya aku akan mengharapkannya.'

118.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man denied the Day of Resurrection and said: 'When I die and am resurrected, I will have wealth and children.' So Allah revealed: 'Have you seen the one who disbelieved in Our verses and said: I will surely be given wealth and children?'
118.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria mengingkari Hari Kebangkitan dan berkata: 'Ketika aku mati dan dibangkitkan, aku akan memiliki harta dan anak-anak.' Maka Allah menurunkan: 'Apakah kamu melihat orang yang kafir terhadap ayat-ayat Kami dan berkata: Sungguh aku akan diberi harta dan anak-anak?'

119.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Were it not for that, I would have prayed for it — for my illness has been long. He then said: Our companions who passed away were not diminished at all by the world, whereas we obtained after them that for which we find no place except the soil.'
119.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seandainya bukan karena itu, aku akan berdoa untuk itu — karena sakitku telah lama. Ia kemudian berkata: Para sahabat kami yang telah wafat tidak dikurangi sedikit pun oleh dunia, sedangkan kami memperoleh setelah mereka apa yang tidak kami temukan tempatnya kecuali tanah.'

120.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Allah will perfect this affair until a rider travels between Sana'a and Hadramawt fearing nothing except Allah and the wolf against his flock.'
120.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Allah akan menyempurnakan urusan ini hingga seorang pengendara bepergian antara Sana'a dan Hadramawt tanpa takut apapun kecuali Allah dan serigala terhadap kawanan kambingnya.'

121.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to milk a goat for them and it would fill their bowl to the brim. When Khabbab himself milked it, the milk returned to what it had been before.
121.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memerah kambing betina mereka dan mengisi mangkuk mereka hingga penuh. Ketika Khabbab sendiri yang memerah, susunya kembali seperti semula.

122.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I can recall being with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ without possessing a dirham, yet now in a corner of my house there are forty thousand dirhams.' Then his shroud was brought and when he saw it, he wept, saying: 'But Hamzah had no shroud except a striped cloak.'
122.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku ingat bersama Rasulullah ﷺ tanpa memiliki satu dirham pun, namun sekarang di sudut rumahku ada empat puluh ribu dirham.' Kemudian kain kafannya dibawa dan ketika ia melihatnya, ia menangis, berkata: 'Tetapi Hamzah tidak memiliki kain kafan kecuali selimut bergaris.'

123.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Companions said to the Prophet ﷺ: 'Will you not pray to Allah for us or seek His help?' He said: 'Among those who came before you, a man would be seized, a hole dug for him, a saw placed on his head splitting him in two, yet this would not deter him from his religion.'
123.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa para Sahabat berkata kepada Nabi ﷺ: 'Tidakkah engkau berdoa kepada Allah bagi kami atau memohon pertolongan-Nya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Di antara orang-orang sebelum kalian, seseorang ditangkap, lubang digali untuknya, gergaji diletakkan di kepalanya sehingga membelahnya menjadi dua, namun ini tidak menghalanginya dari agamanya.'

124.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ came out to them while they were waiting for the Zuhr prayer and said: 'Listen.' They said: 'We are listening.' He said: 'Listen.' He then said: 'There will be rulers over you — do not assist them in their oppression. Whoever affirms their lies will not reach me at the Hawd.'
124.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ keluar kepada mereka saat mereka menunggu shalat Zhuhur dan bersabda: 'Dengarlah.' Mereka berkata: 'Kami mendengar.' Beliau bersabda: 'Akan ada penguasa atas kalian — jangan bantu mereka dalam kezaliman mereka. Siapa yang membenarkan kebohongan mereka tidak akan menemuiku di Hawd.'

125.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man denied the resurrection, saying: 'When I die and am resurrected I will come to you with wealth and children and give you your due.' So Allah revealed the verse: 'Have you seen the one who disbelieved in Our verses and said I will surely be given wealth and children — until: and he will come to Us alone.'
125.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria mengingkari kebangkitan, berkata: 'Ketika aku mati dan dibangkitkan aku akan datang kepadamu dengan harta dan anak-anak dan memberikan hakmu.' Maka Allah menurunkan ayat: 'Apakah kamu melihat yang kafir terhadap ayat-ayat Kami dan berkata aku pasti akan diberi harta dan anak-anak — hingga: dan dia akan datang kepada Kami seorang diri.'

126.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man from the pagans said to the Prophet ﷺ: 'Follow the religion of Muhammad until you die, then you will be resurrected.' He laughed and said: 'I will have wealth and children then and give you your due.' So Allah revealed: 'Have you seen the one who disbelieved in Our verses and said I will surely be given wealth and children — has he seen the unseen or has he taken a covenant with the Most Merciful?'
126.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang musyrik berkata kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang seorang pria yang mengatakan ia akan mengikuti agama Muhammad hingga mati lalu dibangkitkan. Ia tertawa dan berkata: 'Aku akan punya harta dan anak-anak lalu memberimu hakmu.' Maka Allah menurunkan: 'Apakah kamu melihat yang kafir terhadap ayat-ayat Kami dan berkata aku pasti akan diberi harta dan anak-anak — apakah ia telah melihat yang gaib atau mengambil perjanjian dari Yang Maha Pengasih?'

127.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that the shroud of Hamzah could not cover both his head and his feet at once. When they covered his head, his feet were exposed. When they covered his feet, his head was exposed. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Cover his head and place idhkhir grass over his feet.'
127.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa kain kafan Hamzah tidak bisa menutupi kepala dan kakinya sekaligus. Ketika menutupi kepalanya, kakinya terlihat. Ketika menutupi kakinya, kepalanya terlihat. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tutuplah kepalanya dan letakkan rumput idhkhir di atas kakinya.'

128.iwh_en: It was narrated that someone asked: 'Did the Prophet ﷺ recite in Zuhr and Asr?' He said: 'Yes.' He asked: 'How did you know?' He replied: 'By the movement of his beard.'
128.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seseorang bertanya: 'Apakah Nabi ﷺ membaca dalam Zhuhur dan Ashar?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Ia bertanya: 'Bagaimana kalian tahu?' Ia menjawab: 'Dari gerakan jenggot beliau.'

129.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khabbab (may Allah be pleased with him) that Qays visited him while he had been cauterized seven times in his stomach. He heard him say: 'Were it not that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade us from praying for death, I would have prayed for it.'
129.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khabbab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Qays mengunjunginya sementara ia telah dibakar tujuh kali di perutnya. Ia mendengarnya berkata: 'Seandainya bukan karena Rasulullah ﷺ melarang kami dari berdoa untuk kematian, niscaya aku akan berdoa untuk itu.'

130.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked: 'Can we pray in camel pens?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'No.' He asked: 'Should I perform ablution from camel meat?' He said: 'Yes.' He asked: 'Can we pray in sheepfolds?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Yes.' He asked: 'Should I perform ablution from mutton?' He said: 'No.'
130.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria bertanya: 'Bolehkah kami shalat di kandang unta?' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak.' Ia bertanya: 'Apakah aku perlu berwudhu setelah daging unta?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya.' Ia bertanya: 'Bolehkah kami shalat di kandang kambing?' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ya.' Ia bertanya: 'Apakah aku perlu berwudhu setelah daging kambing?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak.'

131.iwh_en: It was narrated that a short, compact man said: 'O Prophet of Allah, I find no parallel for this killing in early Islam except like sheep that come to drink and the first of them are struck, causing the rest to flee. Set the precedent today, even if it changes tomorrow.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ raised his hand and said: 'No, rather you accept.'
131.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang pria bertubuh pendek dan kekar berkata: 'Ya Nabi Allah, aku tidak menemukan padanan untuk pembunuhan ini di awal Islam kecuali seperti kambing yang datang minum dan yang pertama dipukul sehingga yang lain lari. Tetapkan sunnah hari ini, meskipun besok berubah.' Rasulullah ﷺ mengangkat tangan dan bersabda: 'Tidak, terimalah.'

132.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'O Messenger of Allah, what if I come across a sheep belonging to my cousin — may I slaughter one of them?' He said: 'If you find it with a ewe carrying a knife and kindling in the Khabt al-Jumaysh desert, do not touch it.'
132.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, bagaimana jika aku menemukan kambing milik sepupuku — bolehkah aku menyembelih seekor dari mereka?' Beliau bersabda: 'Jika kamu menemukannya dengan seekor betina yang membawa pisau dan kayu api di padang Khabt al-Jumaysh, jangan sentuh.'

133.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Nothing of a brother's wealth is lawful for a man except what is given willingly.' He said: 'O Messenger of Allah, what if I come across a sheep belonging to my cousin and take one to slaughter — is there anything against me for that?' He said: 'If you find a ewe carrying a knife and kindling, do not touch it.'
133.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada yang halal dari harta saudaranya bagi seseorang kecuali apa yang diberikan dengan rela.' Ia berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, bagaimana jika aku menemukan kambing sepupuku dan mengambil seekor untuk disembelih — apakah ada sesuatu atasku?' Beliau bersabda: 'Jika kamu menemukan betina yang membawa pisau dan kayu api, jangan sentuh.'

134.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) that Umar said: 'Ali is the most judicious among us, and Ubayy is the best Quran reciter among us, and we leave many of Ubayy's recitations, and Ubayy says: I heard it from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and will not leave it for anything.'
134.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Umar berkata: 'Ali adalah yang paling bijaksana di antara kita, dan Ubayy adalah perawi Al-Quran terbaik di antara kita, dan kita meninggalkan banyak dari bacaan Ubayy, dan Ubayy berkata: Aku mendengarnya dari Rasulullah ﷺ dan tidak akan meninggalkannya karena apapun.'

135.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) that Umar said: 'Ali is the most judicious among us, and Ubayy is the best reciter among us, and we leave some of what Ubayy says, while Ubayy says: I took it from the mouth of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and will not leave it.'
135.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Umar berkata: 'Ali adalah yang paling bijaksana di antara kita, dan Ubayy adalah perawi terbaik di antara kita, dan kita meninggalkan sebagian dari apa yang dikatakan Ubayy, sementara Ubayy berkata: Aku mengambilnya dari mulut Rasulullah ﷺ dan tidak akan meninggalkannya.'

136.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with them both) that Umar delivered a khutbah from the minbar of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: 'Ali is the most judicious among us, and Ubayy is the best reciter among us, and we leave some of what Ubayy says, though Ubayy heard it from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
136.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa Umar berkhutbah dari mimbar Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: 'Ali adalah yang paling bijaksana di antara kita, dan Ubayy adalah perawi terbaik di antara kita, dan kita meninggalkan sebagian dari apa yang dikatakan Ubayy, meskipun Ubayy mendengarnya dari Rasulullah ﷺ.'

137.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about a man who has intercourse with his wife but does not ejaculate. He said: 'He should wash his private parts and perform ablution and pray.'
137.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang seorang pria yang berhubungan badan dengan istrinya tetapi tidak keluar. Beliau bersabda: 'Ia harus mencuci kemaluannya, berwudhu, dan shalat.'

138.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ regarding the one who has intercourse with his wife then does not ejaculate — that he should wash his private part and perform ablution.
138.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Rasulullah ﷺ tentang orang yang berhubungan badan dengan istrinya kemudian tidak keluar — bahwa ia harus mencuci kemaluannya dan berwudhu.

139.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When a man has intercourse with his wife and is slow to ejaculate, he should wash what has touched the woman from him, then perform ablution.'
139.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika seorang pria berhubungan badan dengan istrinya dan lambat mengeluarkan, ia harus mencuci apa yang mengenai wanita itu, kemudian berwudhu.'

140.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: The Quran was revealed in seven modes of recitation.'
140.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Al-Quran diturunkan dalam tujuh huruf (ahruf).'

141.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that Jibril and Mika'il came to him and one said: 'Recite the Quran on one mode.' The other said: 'Ask for more.' He kept asking until they reached seven modes of recitation.
141.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Jibril dan Mikail datang kepadanya dan salah satu berkata: 'Bacalah Al-Quran dengan satu huruf.' Yang lain berkata: 'Minta tambah.' Ia terus meminta hingga mencapai tujuh huruf.

142.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Allah has not revealed in the Torah or the Gospel anything like the Mother of the Quran, which is the Seven Oft-Repeated verses.'
142.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah tidak menurunkan dalam Taurat maupun Injil sesuatu yang seperti Induk Al-Quran, yaitu Tujuh ayat yang diulang-ulang.'

143.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ asked him: 'How do you recite when you stand to pray?' He recited the opening chapter of the Book. He said: 'That is it — and it is the Seven Oft-Repeated verses and the Great Quran that I have been given.'
143.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bertanya kepadanya: 'Bagaimana kamu membaca ketika kamu berdiri untuk shalat?' Ia membaca pembuka Kitab. Beliau bersabda: 'Itulah — dan itu adalah Tujuh ayat yang diulang-ulang dan Al-Quran yang Agung yang telah diberikan kepadaku.'

144.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the ruling the people used to issue — that water is only required when there is discharge — was a concession that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave, but then it was abrogated.
144.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa fatwa yang biasa dikeluarkan orang — bahwa air hanya diwajibkan ketika ada ejakulasi — adalah keringanan yang diberikan Rasulullah ﷺ, tetapi kemudian dinasakh.

145.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said to the Prophet ﷺ: 'I led some women in a household in prayer — they said: You recite and we don't, so lead us in prayer. I prayed eight rak'ahs and the witr.' The Prophet ﷺ was silent, and we considered his silence to be approval.
145.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata kepada Nabi ﷺ: 'Aku mengimami sejumlah wanita dalam sebuah rumah dalam shalat — mereka berkata: Kamu membaca dan kami tidak, maka imamilah kami. Aku shalat delapan rakaat dan witir.' Nabi ﷺ diam, dan kami menganggap diamnya sebagai persetujuan.

146.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ cauterized him.
146.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengobatinya dengan kay (besi panas).

147.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the ruling that they used to give — that water is only required when there is discharge — was a concession that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave for a time, but then he commanded the full bath.
147.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa fatwa yang biasa mereka berikan — bahwa air hanya diperlukan saat ada ejakulasi — adalah keringanan yang Rasulullah ﷺ berikan untuk sementara, kemudian beliau memerintahkan mandi penuh.

148.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the ruling about the necessity of bathing after intercourse without ejaculation was that it is not required — but this was a concession that was later superseded.
148.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa hukum tentang kewajiban mandi setelah jimak tanpa ejakulasi adalah tidak wajib — tetapi ini merupakan keringanan yang kemudian diganti.

149.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the ruling about intercourse without ejaculation — that bathing is not required — was a concession the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave for a while. Then he commanded the full bath.
149.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa hukum jimak tanpa ejakulasi — bahwa mandi tidak diwajibkan — adalah keringanan yang diberikan Rasulullah ﷺ untuk sementara. Kemudian beliau memerintahkan mandi penuh.

150.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded the full bath after intercourse regardless of ejaculation.
150.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan mandi penuh setelah jimak terlepas dari ada atau tidaknya ejakulasi.
